payload.answer: I can help with that, but I need a choice because this is an additive fact about Sam. I can either store it as a separate detail or keep it alongside any existing notes about Sam, without merging it automatically.
citations: For context, /brain remember Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.
